qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

Haissem Hassan (Egypt) wins a free kick on the right wing.

Foul by Rodrigo De Paul (Argentina).
Corner, Egypt. Conceded by Lisandro Martínez.
Goal! Argentina 0, Egypt 1. Yasser Ibrahim (Egypt) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Marwan Attia with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 亚西尔·易卜拉欣破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Julián Alvarez (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

player.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Mostafa Shobeir (Egypt). Assisted by Rodrigo De Paul with a cross.
